title_de: Animal Welfare Internationally: TSB/AWF and Global Abuses
title_en: Animal Welfare Internationally: TSB/AWF and Global Abuses
description_de: Josephine Cornes presents the work of the Tierschutzbund Zürich and the Animal Welfare Foundation. She sheds light on cattle feedlots in South America, the horse meat industry in Uruguay.
description_en: Josephine Cornes presents the work of the Tierschutzbund Zürich and the Animal Welfare Foundation. She sheds light on cattle feedlots in South America, the horse meat industry in Uruguay.
